parsed.production_notes: The video is a screencast of an app interface featuring a static illustration. The voiceover is AI-generated text-to-speech. A human hand is composited over the interface to simulate interaction.

characters.appearance: A fair-skinned human hand with short, unpainted fingernails.

scenes.setting: Digital app interface with a gothic illustration.

panels.panel_visual_description: A fair-skinned human hand with short fingernails points its index finger towards the center of the frame. In the upper portion of the frame, there is a black and white gothic illustration. The illustration depicts two men; one is facing forward with a terrified expression, while the other is seen from behind, wearing a top hat. The background of the illustration features a dark, imposing house with arched windows.

scenes.visual_description: The video displays a mobile app interface designed for language learning. A human hand interacts with the screen, tapping on highlighted English words within a text passage. Upon tapping, pop-up dictionary definitions appear, showing pronunciation and translation. The top of the screen features a static, black-and-white gothic illustration.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: I tell you, my friend, this house has a strange power over my mind, and I cannot escape its dark influence,
Unknown speaker says: said Roderick with a pale face and shaking hands. His voice was low but full of fear.
Unknown speaker says: fear.
Unknown speaker says: I looked at him and saw that he truly believed his words.
Unknown speaker says: believed.
Unknown speaker says: The air in the room felt heavy
Unknown speaker says: heavy
Unknown speaker says: and cold. A distant echo
Unknown speaker says: echo
Unknown speaker says: moved through the halls, like the house itself was breathing.
Unknown speaker says: breathe.
scenes.on_screen_text:
GÜNDE SADECE 10 DAKİKA OKUYARAK İNGİLİZCENİ GELİŞTİR
Öğretmenler tarafından önerildi
Oku
Dinle
10 dakika günde
+ 150 yeni kelime
I tell you, my friend, this house has a strange power over my mind, and I cannot escape its dark influence," said Roderick with a pale face and shaking hands. His voice was low but full of fear. I looked at him and saw that he truly believed his words. The air in the room felt heavy and cold. A distant echo moved through the halls, like the house itself was breathing.

mind [maɪnd] zihin
